case_title: LI, SHIRLEY VS HASSAN, COCO et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HASSAN, COCO CHIAO, KENT S & L HOME LOANS, INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, SHIRLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASSAN, COCO CHIAO, KENT S & L HOME LOANS, INC. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $215.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY LI, SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HASSAN, COCO CHIAO, KENT S & L HOME LOANS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-08-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
